data.name: Queen's Brothel
data.detailed_description:
Queen's Brothel is an ambitious project led by a team who believes in telling beautiful and fun stories. Queen's Brothel has many playable characters, each with their own individual goals and aspirations that players can relate to. Join Queen as she travels into foreign land to start her own business, a brothel.

  • High Quality Sex Animations

  • 100+ Unique Sex Images

  • RPG-like mechanics where you level up body parts instead of standard combat stats

  • 100+ outfits for the girls to wear

  • Modding capabilities

Queen's Brothel main fetishes:

  • Freeuse

  • Bukkake

  • Bored / Ignored

  • Gang bangs

  • Futanari

data.short_description: Join Queen as she travels into foreign land to start her own business, a brothel.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0GHZ Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.1 / OpenGL ES 2.0 compatible hardware
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS Catalina
  • 處理器: 2.0GHZ Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.1 / OpenGL ES 2.0 compatible hardware
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Any
  • 處理器: 2.0GHZ Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.1 / OpenGL ES 2.0 compatible hardware
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: 2.0GHZ Dual-Core CPU
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.1 / OpenGL ES 2.0 compatible hardware
  • Storage: 500 MB available space

Recommended:

  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.1 / OpenGL ES 2.0 compatible hardware
  • Storage: 500 MB available space
